The '''Ry'coz''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Novor 23]], the sole habitable [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Novor system/Legends|Novor system]]. It was located on the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], at the northern edge of the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]]<ref name="SSR" />—a small region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that was formerly part of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The Ry'coz cooperated with immigrants of [[Human/Legends|Human]] and other species to produce a thriving economy and cultural scene. This attracted the shipping company [[Jatayus Outbound]] to establish its offices on the Ry'coz's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. The planet's [[Vos'yr valley]] was home to the [[Sprax's villa retreat|villa retreat]] of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]].<ref name="SSR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Ry'coz were created for ''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'', a [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]].<ref name="SSR" />
